root.content: Trich xuat mau cau truc tu BMAD Method va BMAD Builder repomix XML cho Wave 2 synthesis

children.content: Perform targeted XML investigation via delegated hivexplorer scan and synthesize pattern report
Thuc hien nghien cuu read-only co muc tieu, delegation qua subagent de rut mau workflow/persona/guardrail/agent/template va builder/module patterns tu 2 file repomix XML
Khoi tao /hivefiver research va giao nhiem vu trich xuat pattern cho 2 XML repomix, tong hop bao cao cau truc co vi du va bang chung
Delegate extraction of workflow/command/agent/template/phase/script patterns from repomix-gsd-get-shit-done.xml
Khoi dong /hivefiver research: delegate trich xuat pattern cau truc tu 2 repomix XML (read-only, evidence-based)
Tham dinh bao cao trich xuat GSD pattern tu repomix XML theo pham vi read-only, doi chieu bang chung theo dong va file markers
Tong hop bao cao BMAD pattern extraction cho /hivefiver research tu 2 repomix XML read-only
Validate prior extraction report against repomix-gsd-get-shit-done.xml using delegated read-only research with enterprise_architect rigor

Produce evidence-backed read-only validation checkpoints (workflow chain, command-agent schema, template catalog, execute-phase wave model, reference/script catalog, and 7 principles) with line-cited proof
Da nhan bao cao trich xuat pattern BMAD Method + Builder co line-cited evidence; san sang ban giao report cho user
Delivered evidence-backed Wave 2 validation checkpoints with line-cited proof from repomix XML
Wave 2 validation audit complete: 17 evidence-backed citations from repomix XML extracted and validated
Tong hop ket qua doi chieu, danh gia overreach, va phat hanh verdict tham dinh voi trich dan bang chung
Synthesize validated extraction report with corrections and evidence-backed verdict
Produce Chain & Bridge Architecture Specification from synthesized GSD/BMAD patterns and HiveMind framework constraints
Draft and write docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md with required 9 sections, diagrams, and frontmatter, then validate line count and section coverage
Run MCP-backed read-only research synthesis for Chain & Bridge architecture guidance before drafting document.
Coordinate delegated evidence scan across codebase and planning docs to synthesize guidance for 9-section CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md (read-only).
